debug_info.goal:
G : Type u_1
inst✝² : AddCommGroup G
inst✝¹ : Fintype G
inst✝ : Module (ZMod 2) G
A : Set G
⊢ ∃ φ, Nat.card ↑{x | x ∈ A ∧ φ x = 1} ≥ (Nat.card ↑A - 1) / 2

proof:
let f φ := (Nat.card { x | x ∈ A ∧ φ x = 1 } : ℝ)
  have hf : ∑ φ, f φ = Nat.card (A \ {0}) * (Nat.card G / 2 : ℝ) := by
    simp_rw [f, Nat.card_eq_fintype_card, Fintype.card_subtype, Finset.card_eq_sum_ones, Finset.sum_comm]
    simp only [Finset.sum_filter, Finset.mem_univ, ite_true, ← Nat.card_eq_finsetCard]
    rw [← Finset.sum_filter (s := Finset.univ) (p := (· ∈ A))]
    rw [← Finset.sum_filter (s := Finset.univ.filter (· ∈ A)) (p := (· ≠ 0))]
    · simp (config := {contextual := true}) [card_of_dual_constrained, Nat.cast_mul, ← Nat.card_eq_finsetCard]
    · intro x hx; simp at hx; simp [hx]
  obtain ⟨φ, _, hφ⟩ := Finset.exists_ge_of_sum_ge Finset.univ_nonempty f
  use φ; rw [hf, card_of_dual, Nat.card_eq_fintype_card] at hφ
  by_cases hG : Nat.card G = 1
  · simp [hG] at hφ; exact (Nat.div_eq_zero_iff (by norm_num)).mpr (by
      have : Nat.card A ≤ 1 := (Nat.card_mono (Set.toFinite _) (Set.subset_univ A)).trans_le (by simp [hG])
      exact Nat.sub_eq_zero_of_le this) |> (Nat.zero_le _).trans'
  · have : 2 * (Nat.card G / 2) = Nat.card G := by
      obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_pow_of_card_2_group G
      rw [Nat.card_eq_fintype_card] at hk; rw [hk]
      cases k with
      | zero => contradiction
      | succ k => rw [pow_succ, mul_comm, Nat.mul_div_cancel _ (by norm_num)]
    rw [← this, Nat.cast_mul, mul_div_cancel_left _ (by norm_num)] at hφ
    have hA : Nat.card (A \ {0}) ≥ Nat.card A - 1 := (Nat.le_sub_of_add_le (by
      have : A ⊆ insert 0 (A \ {0}) := Set.subset_insert_diff 0 A
      exact (Nat.card_mono (Set.toFinite _) this).trans (Nat.card_insert_le 0 (A \ {0}))))
    exact (Nat.cast_le (α := ℝ).1 (hφ.trans_le' (by rw [Nat.cast_div_le]; norm_num))).trans' (Nat.div_le_div_right hA)
